name: pheno-otel
absorption_note: OpenTelemetry exporter/wrappers for the pheno-* fleet. Target: PhenoObservability as crates/pheno-otel. Complements pheno-tracing (already absorbed into pheno) and the substrate observability spine. Per ADR-036 tracing substrate pattern.
note: Audited 2026-07-17; Rust crate for OTEL bindings; fits observability spine.
